title: bagFilter operation
description: Fabric (bag-house) filter -- the fine, high-efficiency complement to the cyclone.  Hardware: the cloth area.  Collection is near-total and only mildly size-dependent (the dust cake is the filter); the pressure drop is cake-dominated and a RESULT, ΔP = μ·V·(K1 + K2·W) with V = Q/area the air-to-cloth ratio.  Needs a particle-size distribution on the feed (solids block) and a transport model for the gas viscosity.

filterArea.title: Filter (cloth) area A
filterArea.description: Total fabric area [m²].  Sets the face velocity V = Q_gas/A (the air-to-cloth ratio, typically 1-3 m/min).

K1.title: Clean-fabric resistance K1
K1.description: Darcy resistance of the bare cloth [1/m] (default 1e9, calibratable).

K2.title: Specific cake resistance K2
K2.description: Darcy resistance per unit areal dust load [m/kg] (default 1e10, calibratable).

arealDustLoad.title: Areal dust load W
arealDustLoad.description: Cake mass per unit cloth area [kg/m²] at the chosen point in the cleaning cycle (default 0.5).  Drives the cake pressure drop.

penetration0.title: Finest-particle penetration P0
penetration0.description: Penetration of the finest particles in η(d)=1-P0·exp(-d/d_c) (default 0.02, calibratable).

dCharacteristic.title: Characteristic size d_c
dCharacteristic.description: Size scale of the grade-efficiency rise [m] (default 1e-6).
